title: Decadent Gooey Japanese Knafeh Kaiseki Course
description: A spicy and gooey Japanese dish featuring knafeh, render fat, and dairy free friendly ingredients, served in a banana leaf vessel as a kaiseki course.
instructions: Cut the knafeh dough into 1 inch pieces and set aside.
In a small saucepan, heat the render fat over low heat until melted.
In a separate saucepan, combine the coconut milk, maple syrup, and sesame oil, and heat over low heat until warm.
Add the shichimi togarashi and matcha powder to the coconut milk mixture and stir to combine.
To assemble the dish, place a piece of banana leaf on a flat surface and arrange 2-3 pieces of knafeh dough in the center.
Drizzle the melted render fat and coconut milk mixture over the knafeh dough.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a packet and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Place the packets on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the packets warm and enjoy.
